California.mor: HLW repository requirement (Cal. Pub. Res. Code § 25524.1–25524.2)

Connecticut.mor: Partial repeal — opt-in pathway for Millstone site (Conn. Gen. Stat. § 22a-136; 2022 H.B. 5202; 2025 S.B. 4)

Hawaii.mor: Legislature 2/3 supermajority approval required (Haw. Const. art. XI, § 8)

Illinois.mor: Large-reactor HLW moratorium; SMR carve-out ≥ Jan 2026 (220 ILCS 5/8-406; 2023 H.B. 2473, P.A. 103-0569)

Louisiana.waste: HLW import and transport ban (La. Rev. Stat. § 30:2113(D))

Maine.mor: Statewide voter approval + HLW disposal capability required (35-A M.R.S. § 4302; § 4374)

Massachusetts.mor: Voter + legislative approval + operating federal HLW facility required (M.G.L. ch. 164 App. § 3-3)

Minnesota.mor: Statutory cert-of-need ban on new nuclear plants (Minn. Stat. § 216B.243, subd. 3b)

New Jersey.mor: Coastal area approvals require NRC-compliant waste disposal method (N.J.S.A. 13:19-11)

New Mexico.waste: HLW storage/disposal ban — state consent + federal repository required (2023 S.B. 53, Ch. 25)

New York.mor: Prohibition limited to LIPA (Long Island) service area (N.Y. Pub. Auth. Law § 1020-t)

North Dakota.waste: HLW placement, storage, exploration, and disposal ban (N.D.C.C. ch. 38-23)

Oregon.mor: HLW repository + statewide voter approval required (ORS § 469.595; § 469.597)
Oregon.waste: HLW storage ban after license expiry (ORS § 469.594)

Rhode Island.mor: General Assembly retains final approval/denial authority (R.I. Gen. Laws § 42-64-14.1)

Texas.waste: HLW disposal/storage ban — limited on-site exceptions (2021 H.B. 7, 87th Called Session)

Vermont.mor: General Assembly must approve before cert. of public good issued (30 V.S.A. § 248(e)(1))

Washington.waste: Out-of-state radioactive waste storage and import ban (RCW 70A.390.030)

Wyoming.waste: HLW storage facility requires specific legislative authorization (Wyo. Stat. § 35-11-1506)
